subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, the All-Loving, Who doth shower upon the reality of existence an everlasting bounty in the realm of being, Who hath ordained for His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ربی الودود الفائض علی حقیقه الوجود فیضا ابدیا فی حیز الشهود المقدر لاحبائه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @power of prayer, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
